user.title: User Account
user.description: User profile, balance, and owned themes metadata.

name.description: The full name of the user

avatarUrl.description: The URL of the user's avatar image

premiumCoins.description: The balance of in-app coins for theme purchases

idCode.description: Unique generated user ID starting with #

ownedThemes.description: List of color theme hex values currently owned by this user

note.title: Note
note.description: A notebook entry created by the user.

userId.description: The owner's authenticated user ID link

category.description: Notebook folder category of the entry

createdAt.description: The time of creation of this note

color.description: The theme color hex for this individual note's highlight card

shop_item.title: Shop Item
shop_item.description: An item available in the theme store.

id.description: Unique identifier of the shop item

name.description: The title name of the shop item

price.description: Price of the shop item in CLIP coins

clip_package.title: Clip Package
clip_package.description: A purchasable coin package containing standard coins and customizable promotional badges.

numCoins.description: Number of CLIP coins in the package

region.description: Store region e.g. USA or HK

isHot.description: Whether package is highlighted as a popular choice

labelText.description: Promo badge label text displayed over clip logo when clicked/selected e.g., ( 4$ 95%)

/users/{userId}.description: User profiles storing metadata and wallet state

/notes/{noteId}.description: Secure user notes collection indexed by ID

/shop_items/{itemId}.description: Color Theme items sold in the store

/clip_packages/{packageId}.description: Premium CLIP coin package configuration list
